metadata.title: Narrative Report -- Tumbull Refuge -- 1940 field season

pages.raw_text:
1. General
Tumbull refuge received visitors from Spokane County Sportsmens Assn.
Gov. Hunter Emgman visited the refuge.
Lightening caused minor fire on Aug. 2 burning 12 acres with cost $5.00.

2. Wildlife
Only two covies of Hungarian partridge were seen and 5 white-tailed deer were reported.

3. Public Relations
Contacts were maintained with business men of Cheney and nearby farmers.
